title: antidesma diandrum var. genuinum
intro: Antidesma diandrum var. genuinum, also known as the Yellow Mangosteen or False Mangosteen, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues, fever, and infections. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including arthritis, diabetes, and cardiovascular diseases. Antidesma diandrum var. genuinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
